desc: Built blackboard multi-agent systems for autonomous information discovery in data science workflows.

supervisor: Cheng Li, Mingyang Zhang, and Michael Bendersky
desc: Personalized large language models using reinforcement learning, self-training, inference-compute scaling, reasoning, and pluralistic alignment techniques.
Personalized large language models by optimizing retrievers with reinforcement learning from language model feedback.
Built an AutoML system for text classification with a focus on sentiment analysis and automatic moderation of user-generated product reviews.
